calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Petitioner: Chia-Chin Tsai, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Jenny Tsai.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-17-2004 Reset To Jun-17-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 306 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-17-2004 Reset To Jul-01-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: PETN FOR CHANGE OF NAME CONTINUED TO JULY 1, 2004, 9AM, DEPT. 218. COURT WAIVES RE-PUBLISHING REQUIREMENTS. PLTF CSL NOT PRESENT. JUDGE KEVIN MC CARTHY; CLERK-BBSURRATT;REPORTER-MITCH LYON; (DEPT. 306)
